name: Polymarket
description: Full Polymarket prediction market toolkit. Browse events and markets, get real-time prices and orderbooks, and trade (place/cancel orders) on the CLOB.

credential_fields.name: secret
credential_fields.label: Secret
credential_fields.description: Polymarket CLOB API Secret (base64-encoded, for HMAC signing)

credential_fields.name: private_key
credential_fields.label: Private_key
credential_fields.description: Polygon wallet private key (hex, for EIP-712 order signing)

tools.name: list_events
tools.description: Get active prediction market events from the Gamma API. Events group related markets (e.g., 'US Election 2024' contains markets for each candidate). Returns titles, slugs, and nested market data.

tools.name: get_event
tools.description: Get a specific event by its URL slug. Returns full event details including all associated markets with their condition_ids and token_ids.

tools.name: list_markets
tools.description: Get prediction markets from the Gamma API. Markets are individual YES/NO outcomes. Returns condition_id (for CLOB lookup) and clobTokenIds (for trading).

tools.name: get_market
tools.description: Get a specific market by slug. Returns prices, volume, condition_id, and clobTokenIds needed for trading.

tools.name: list_tags
tools.description: Get all available tags/categories for filtering markets (e.g., Politics, Sports, Crypto). Use tag IDs with polymarket-markets-by-tag.

tools.name: markets_by_tag
tools.description: Get markets filtered by tag/category ID. Use polymarket-list-tags first to find tag IDs.

tools.name: get_sports
tools.description: Get sports-related metadata including tag IDs, images, and series info for sports prediction markets.

tools.name: get_price
tools.description: Get the current best available price for a token on the CLOB. Returns the best bid (BUY) or ask (SELL) price.

side.description: BUY for best ask, SELL for best bid

tools.name: get_midpoint
tools.description: Get the midpoint price for a token (average of best bid and best ask). Good for estimating fair value.

tools.name: get_orderbook
tools.description: Get the full order book for a token showing all bids and asks with sizes. Essential for understanding market depth before placing orders.

tools.name: get_spread
tools.description: Get the bid-ask spread for a token. Lower spread = more liquid market.

tools.name: get_tick_size
tools.description: Get the minimum price increment for a token. Orders must use prices that are multiples of the tick size (0.1, 0.01, 0.001, or 0.0001).

tools.name: get_last_trade_price
tools.description: Get the price of the most recent trade for a token.

tools.name: get_clob_market
tools.description: Get CLOB market details by condition ID. Returns token IDs, tick size, min order size, and neg_risk flag needed for trading.

condition_id.description: Market condition ID (from Gamma API market data)

tools.name: list_clob_markets
tools.description: List all tradeable markets on the CLOB with pagination via cursor.

next_cursor.description: Pagination cursor from previous response (omit for first page)

tools.name: get_prices_history
tools.description: Get historical price data for a market. Use for charting and analysis.

tools.name: get_market_trades
tools.description: Get recent trade events for a specific market. Shows who traded, what price, and what size.

tools.name: get_server_time
tools.description: Get the CLOB server time. Useful for verifying clock synchronization before trading.

tools.name: get_balance
tools.description: Get your USDC balance and trading allowances on Polymarket. Requires authentication.

token_id.description: Token ID (required for CONDITIONAL asset type)

tools.name: get_open_orders
tools.description: Get all your open (live) orders. Optionally filter by market. Requires authentication.

tools.name: get_order
tools.description: Get details of a specific order by its ID. Returns status, fill amount, and trade details. Requires authentication.

tools.name: get_trades
tools.description: Get your trade history (filled orders). Requires authentication.

tools.name: cancel_order
tools.description: Cancel a specific open order by its ID. Requires authentication.

tools.name: cancel_all_orders
tools.description: Cancel ALL your open orders on Polymarket. Use with caution. Requires authentication.

tools.name: cancel_market_orders
tools.description: Cancel all your open orders for a specific market. Requires authentication.

market.description: Condition ID of the market to cancel orders for

tools.name: create_order
tools.description: Place a limit order on Polymarket. The order is cryptographically signed (EIP-712) and submitted to the CLOB. Price is between 0 and 1 (probability). Use polymarket-get-orderbook first to check liquidity. Requires credentials with private_key for signing.

token_id.description: Token ID to trade (clobTokenId from market data — use polymarket-get-clob-market)

price.description: Limit price between 0 and 1 (e.g., 0.65 = 65 cents per share = 65% probability)

size.description: Number of shares to buy or sell

side.description: BUY to go long (bet YES), SELL to go short (bet NO)

expiration.description: Unix timestamp for GTD order expiration (must be > now + 60s)

neg_risk.description: Set true for markets with 3+ outcomes. Auto-detected if omitted.

tools.name: create_market_order
tools.description: Place a market order that executes immediately at the best available price. For BUY: amount is in USDC. For SELL: amount is in shares. Use worst_price as a slippage limit. Requires credentials with private_key for signing.

amount.description: USDC amount for BUY orders, share count for SELL orders

worst_price.description: Maximum price willing to pay (slippage protection, 0-1)

neg_risk.description: Set true for markets with 3+ outcomes. Auto-detected if omitted.
